error_message: failed to resolve: use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `libutf`
error_snippet:
|
1 | use libutf::libutf_string::Utf8String;
  |     ^^^^^^ use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `libutf`
  |
  = help: if you wanted to use a crate named `libutf`, use `cargo add libutf` to add it to your `Cargo.toml`

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0433`.
